creator: oahong@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for your great work @Bjoern, my realtek wireless card, which has a different subvendor between ones on the support matrix, works fine now on 13.1-RC2. 
Hope we can get rid of the annoying "failed to get tx report from firmware" error messages assp

patches applied to 13.1-rc2:
2774f206809b8fd3a4904fe945f029a414fbc642
73d4ebea3567f18db549638c3d897b6d6758faa4
20eeed6844e2ab82b909e02c720101297e78d916
3443476ca9e751cebbb1c467091551bf3d518814
86220d3cbd500b1018dcdabb0ba70644db438cfd
20220408-01-lkpi-skb-rtw88-4g.diff
9df5f29caf1a818999d0e908cab95c83bd1f4323 (kernel crash without this one)

pcconf output:

    vendor     = 'Realtek Semiconductor Co., Ltd.'
    device     = 'RTL8822CE 802.11ac PCIe Wireless Network Adapter'
    class      = network
